message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.solve wrapper parity (franken_numpy-n795)

Add fnp_python.solve(a, b) as a passthrough delegator to
np.linalg.solve so square real/complex, multiple-RHS (2-D b),
and batched (..., M, M) / (..., M, K) broadcasting semantics all
match numpy exactly.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with five scenarios: 2x2 with
1-D b, 3x3 with 2-D (multi-RHS) b, 4x4 identity passthrough,
batched 2-stack of 2x2 solves with per-slice 2-D b, and a
complex128 2x2 with complex b. All allclose-compared against
np.linalg.solve.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
